TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Kawabata ga niya mki sku Sincik Keng atu Gpho go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 54 buwan, 174 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 94% kyan ku 164 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 6% kyan ku 10 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 91%, Amis 1%, Paywan 1%, saySiyat 2%. maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Kawabata hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay 'zil na Kawabata hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Kawabata hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Kawabata hya' ga llyung. tay 'zil na Kawabata hya' ga Sipazi'. tay mkraya' na Kawabata hya' ga Kyu'ang. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ kawaβata ɣa nija mki s~ɕku s~ɕinʦ~ʨik keŋ atu ɣpħo ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, tajan **%, amis~ɕ *%, pajwan *%, s~ɕajs~ɕijat *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na kawaβata ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj ʔzil na kawaβata ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkjaħuʔ na kawaβata ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na kawaβata ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj ʔzil na kawaβata ħjaʔ ɣa s~ɕipaziʔ. taj mkrajaʔ na kawaβata ħjaʔ ɣa kjuʔaŋ. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
S.FORM: alang Kawabata ga niya mki sku Sincik Keng atu Gpho go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 54 buwan, 174 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 94% kyan ku 164 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 6% kyan ku 10 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 91%, Amis 1%, Paywan 1%, saySiyat 2%. maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Kawabata hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay 'zil na Kawabata hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Kawabata hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Kawabata hya' ga llyung. tay 'zil na Kawabata hya' ga Sipazi'. tay mkraya' na Kawabata hya' ga Kyu'ang. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ kawaβata ɣa nija mki s~ɕku s~ɕinʦ~ʨik keŋ atu ɣpħo ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, tajan **%, amis~ɕ *%, pajwan *%, s~ɕajs~ɕijat *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na kawaβata ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj ʔzil na kawaβata ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkjaħuʔ na kawaβata ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na kawaβata ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj ʔzil na kawaβata ħjaʔ ɣa s~ɕipaziʔ. taj mkrajaʔ na kawaβata ħjaʔ ɣa kjuʔaŋ. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
